name: HWM IC Card Intelligent Water Meter
desc: Prepaid IC card smart water meter. Pay-before-use, automatic valve control by balance, anti-counterfeiting, low-voltage protection.
overview: The HWM IC Card Smart Water Meter enables prepaid water metering using an IC card. Users top up at any service station; the meter automatically closes the valve when the balance runs out. Usage history can be checked on the card. Manages over-pressure alarms, anti-tamper detection and remote valve control. Suitable for residential communities, schools, hotels and industrial parks.

specs.label: Prepaid function
specs.value: IC card prepaid; alarm at 5 m³ remaining (configurable); auto valve closure

features: Prepayment "pay before use" model eliminates bill arrears and accelerates revenue recovery
When balance drops to 5 m³ (configurable), meter displays warning and closes valve; user continues on remaining credit
Historical data query: cumulative usage, historical usage, and recent purchase amounts on-card
Unmanned management: no meter reader visits; real-time water usage monitoring reduces labour costs
Anti-tampering and anti-fraud design with automatic alarm and lock-out for multiple abnormal situations
Energy saving: users can query real-time consumption and cost to promote water conservation
